headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scores twice as Portugal rout Uzbekistan to get campaign back on track
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo at the double as Portugal rout Uzbekistan

headlines.description: Thomas Tuchel's stilted side stumbled to a 0-0 draw with well-drilled Ghana as England edged closer to the World Cup knockout phase in forgettable fashion.
headlines.shortLinkText: England held by Ghana as Kane skies late chance

headlines.description: Josip Stanisic lifted a curving cross onto the boot of Ante Budimir, who tapped it into an open net in the 54th minute Tuesday, giving Croatia a 1-0 win over Panama in the FIFA World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Panama out of World Cup after loss to Croatia

headlines.description: With the victory, third-place Bosnia-Herzegovina are more than likely to advance to the round of 32 in the expanded field -- and their likely opponent would be one of the tournaments co-hosts in the United States.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bosnia beat Qatar, likely to face U.S. in knockouts

headlines.description: Breel Embolo helped to dash co-hosts Canada's hopes of a last-32 clash on home soil as unbeaten Switzerland clinched top spot in Group B with a 2-1 victory in Vancouver.
headlines.shortLinkText: Switzerland beat Canada to top group as co-hosts fail to seal home round-of-32 match
